calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-08-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Nici Ronich.
Petitioner: Tomasa Garcia, present in pro per as guardian ad litem for the Minor: Gracia Janette Garcia, and with Spanish Interpreter: Bonnie Chevez.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
At Petitioner's request in open court, matter is taken off calendar.
Petitioner to refile for an Amended Petition to Change Name of a Minor, with pro per name listed in the petition and publication.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-06-2007 Reset To Feb-08-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
